LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS FRED MUSNI AND ANDANGELO DE LOS REYES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED PURSUANT TO C C P 437 C(E), THE COURT EXCERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO DENY SUMMARY JUDGMENT BECAUSE DEFENDANT RELIES SOLELY ON HIS OWN DECLARATION FOR FACTS AS TO WHICH HE IS THE SOLE WITNESS AT LEAST AS TO THE AMOUNT OF ANY TIMELY CONTRIBUTED LABOR.
